sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53517" key="karueri/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰρῠ-ερία</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κυβεία</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n53517.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dicing for nuts</tr_>, dub. l. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:6:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
